summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FitStart complete auth flow with new Dashboard page. All critical user flows from Landing → Register → Dashboard and Login → Dashboard are working excellently. Backend authentication APIs remain functional and frontend integration is seamless.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 422 for missing authentication token
minor_issues.impact: Very minor - both status codes indicate authentication failure correctly

passed_tests: Landing page loads with FitStart branding and Get Started button
Register page navigation and form accessibility
User registration with unique email (testflow1772919401@example.com)
Registration form validation and submission processing
Registration successful redirect to /dashboard (NOT home page)
Dashboard page loads with proper data-testid attributes
Welcome message displays user's first name correctly (Welcome back, Test!)
User's full name shows in navbar (Test User 1772919401)
Dashboard shows 3 program cards with correct pricing
Starter program card displays $19 price correctly
Transformer program card displays $39 price correctly
Elite Beginner program card displays $59 price correctly
All 3 Buy Now buttons are clickable and functional
Buy Now buttons trigger appropriate responses (placeholder alerts)
Logout button functionality works correctly
Logout redirects to landing page (/) not dashboard
Login page form fields and submission processing
Login with registered credentials successful
Login successful redirect to /dashboard (NOT home page)
Dashboard content displays correctly after login
Dashboard route protection works - unauthorized access redirects to /login
Authentication state persistence across page navigation
Backend authentication APIs working (88.9% success rate)
Frontend-backend integration seamless for auth flows

success_percentage.backend: 89% (8/9 tests passed - minor status code difference)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All UI components and complete auth flow working)
success_percentage.overall: 97% (Excellent functionality with only minor backend status code issue)
